case_title: CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. VS. ROBERT MURO et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-16-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MURO, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-16-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-17-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-01-2003
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. SERVED MAR-16-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MURO, ROBERT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURO, ROBERT $2,248.21 PRINCIPAL, $562.05 ATTORNEY FEES, $836.30 INTEREST, $185.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,831.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-25-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MURO, ROBERT
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-22-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MURO, ROBERT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $155.37 INTEREST, $60.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MURO, ROBERT
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP.
